title: henckelia stolonifera
intro: Henckelia stolonifera, also known as Stomach Lily, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the treatment of digestive disorders and fever. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of saponins and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Henckelia stolonifera include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and anti-inflammatory effects, and it is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal purposes.
